title: Ribs Weaponry
description: Compatability pack for weapons and tools
body:
A simple compatabilty pack for some mods i like. 
Spears: In the base mod, with no additional mods loaded, youll get access to Flint > Netherite spears, all listed mods below have spears of their material types.
Spears accept most sword enchantments, and piercing (crossbow) and loyalty. 
Mostly revolving around [Sniff's Weapons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sniffs-weapons)

[Oreganized](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oreganized):  Added Electrum Great Sword, Great Pickaxe, Great Axe, Naginata, Surcoat, Helm, Plated Chestplate, Kaboto and Dō when Oreganized And Sniff's Weapons are loaded. 

Brass Scribe when Create is loaded.

Electrum Hammer and Paxel if Create Ironworks is loaded

[Oooh Pinky!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oooh-pinky): Added Sniff's weapon Compat for Rose Gold, as well as paxel and hammer

[Create Ironworks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-ironworks): Added Sniff's compat for all armor and tools.

Copper, Bronze, Brass and Steel knives when [Farmers Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) is loaded.

[Scorched Guns 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scorched-guns): Sniff's compat with Anthralite 

[Better Combat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat-by-daedelus): Compatability for all tools and items in the pack

[Enigmatic Legacy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enigmatic-legacy): Etherium Great Axe, Great Pickaxe, Great Sword and Naginata. And a Spear with unique ability :)

More Compat planned! Any ideas welcome
